file_insights.details: Reformatted conditional logic and changed variable initialization pattern in list_cards_watch function

patterns_discovered.description: Nested if-statements with multiple conditions flattened into single condition chain using && operators
Variables declared without explicit type or initialization value
patterns_discovered.example: let mut prev_stats; instead of let mut prev_stats: Option<CardStats> = None;

patterns_discovered.description: Code reformatted to pass clippy lints and rustfmt checks

gotchas_discovered.description: Variables prev_stats and prev_line_count declared without initialization - must be assigned before use in subsequent code
gotchas_discovered.note: Assignment must occur before the 'Initial render' block that follows

gotchas_discovered.description: Clippy enforces specific formatting for conditions with multiple && operators - requires multi-line formatting when line length exceeds threshold

approach_details.task: Run make check to verify tests, clippy, and formatting
approach_details.validation: make check executed successfully with code formatting fixes applied

recommendations.recommendation: Document that condition flattening improves readability when multiple &&/|| operators exist
Verify that prev_stats and prev_line_count are assigned before 'Initial render' block to avoid uninitialized variable usage
recommendations.context: Uninitialized variables pattern may hide control flow bugs

recommendations.recommendation: Make check is working correctly - formatting passes through clippy and rustfmt in single invocation
